message:
feat: Implement DOM snapshot capture and automated links extraction pipeline

## DOM Snapshot Capture (app/capture.py)
- Add `dom_snapshot: bytes | None` field to CaptureResult dataclass
- Capture full DOM HTML via `page.content()` after viewport sweeps complete
- Return DOM bytes from `_perform_viewport_sweeps()` alongside tiles and stats
- Encode DOM HTML as UTF-8 bytes for storage

## Storage Layer (app/store.py)
- Implement `write_dom_snapshot()` to persist DOM HTML to disk
  - Creates DOM snapshot path from RunPaths
  - Handles None/empty HTML gracefully
  - Returns path to written snapshot
- Add `write_links()` method to store extracted links as JSON
  - Accepts sequence of link mappings
  - Writes formatted JSON with proper indentation
  - Returns path to links.json file

## Job Pipeline Integration (app/jobs.py)
- Extract DOM snapshot from CaptureResult in `execute_capture_job()`
- Persist DOM HTML via `Storage.write_dom_snapshot()`
- Automatically extract links from DOM using `extract_links_from_dom()`
- Store extracted links as JSON via `Storage.write_links()`
- Add error handling for link extraction failures (log and continue)
- Import dom_links utilities for extraction and serialization
- Add HMAC-SHA256 webhook signing support with `build_signed_webhook_sender()`

## API Enhancements (app/main.py)
- Improve `/jobs/{job_id}/events` endpoint with proper NDJSON streaming
  - Add heartbeat mechanism with 5-second timeout
  - Track event sequences to avoid duplicates
  - Stream initial events before subscribing to queue
  - Return application/x-ndjson content type
- Add `_serialize_log_entry()` helper for consistent JSON formatting
- Fix type safety with `cast(dict[str, Any], environment)` for env data
- Enhance `/jobs/{job_id}/links.json` to serve stored links
  - Fall back to demo data for job_id="demo"
  - Return 404 for missing jobs or files
- Add `/jobs/{job_id}/manifest.json` endpoint for manifest retrieval
- Add `/jobs/{job_id}/result.md` endpoint for markdown results

## CLI Improvements (scripts/mdwb_cli.py)
- Simplify `events` command to use single streaming approach
- Fix response parsing with `response.text.splitlines()`
- Remove duplicate event streaming implementations
- Improve error handling with HTTPError fallback to polling
- Clean up redundant cursor tracking logic

## Test Coverage (tests/test_job_manager.py)
- Add comprehensive event log history test
- Add event log length clamping test with monkeypatch
- Fix CaptureManifest initialization with all required fields
  - Add `overlap_match_ratio` and `validation_failures`
- Verify event sequences are properly maintained

## Documentation Updates
- Update PLAN with DOM snapshot and links extraction progress notes
- Add bead co1 for code review and stability improvements
- Track WhiteSnow's work on manifest overlap ratios in dm9 bead
- Document links.json availability via Store and API endpoints

## Technical Details
- DOM capture happens after all viewport sweeps and retries complete
- Links extraction runs as optional post-processing step
- Failures in link extraction don't fail the job (logged only)
- DOM snapshots enable offline analysis and debugging
- Links JSON provides navigation structure for UI/agents

This completes the DOM capture pipeline, enabling the system to preserve the full page structure alongside OCR tiles and automatically extract navigational links for downstream consumption.

+async def test_job_manager_event_log_records_history(tmp_path: Path):

+

+    history = manager.get_events(job_id)
